name: Athena Bitcoin Global
business: Athena Bitcoin Global operates a global network of Bitcoin ATMs that allow customers to buy or sell Bitcoin in exchange for fiat currency. The company also offers over-the-counter personalized services (Athena Plus), white-label operations, and payment services. Its primary customers are retail individuals seeking to convert cash to Bitcoin or vice versa.

exposures.sentence: We are an early entrant in the crypto asset market and one of the first U.S. publicly-traded companies using crypto assets and blockchain technologies in our business operations which include a global network of Athena Bitcoin automated teller machines (ATMs) that allow our customers to buy or sell bitcoin in exchange for their local Fiat Currency, such as the U.S. Dollar.

catalysts.event: New three-year Master Services Agreement with Chivo signed
catalysts.sentence: On December 20, 2024, a new three-year MSA and SLA with Chivo was signed effective December 1, 2024.

tamClaims.claim: The ATM services market size is projected to grow from $23.23 billion in 2025 to $24.71 billion in 2026 at a CAGR of 6.4%.
tamClaims.sentence: The ATM services market size has grown strongly in recent years and is projected to grow from $23.23 billion in 2025 to $24.71 billion in 2026 at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.4%.

tamClaims.claim: The global cryptocurrency market will reach $18.26 billion USD by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 14.5% from 2026 to 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: A study undertaken by Grand Review Research projects that the global cryptocurrency market will reach $18.26 billion USD by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 14.5 percent from 2026 to 2033.

tamClaims.claim: As of December 31, 2025, there were approximately 39.2 thousand Bitcoin ATMs worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, there were approximately 39.2 thousand Bitcoin ATMs worldwide, according to information posted on MEXC, looking at data from Finbold Research based on Coin ATM Radar figures.

tamClaims.claim: Global cryptocurrency owners increased to 741 million in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Global cryptocurrency owners increased by 12.4% in 2025, rising from 659 million in 2024 to 741 million in 2025.
